Premium Roasted

Experience the crunch of health with Ugna Ji. We manufacture the finest quality roasted makhana in various delicious flavors.

About Nagarkot Food

Pioneering Healthier Snacking with Ugna Ji

Nagarkot Food Product Pvt Ltd is a premier manufacturer of roasted flavoured makhana. Under our flagship brand Ugna Ji, we bring you the perfect blend of traditional nutrition and modern taste.

Premium Quality

Handpicked foxnuts roasted to perfection.

Hygienic Process

Automated manufacturing for zero contamination.

Our Range

Explore Our Delicious Flavors

Black Pepper

Black Pepper Makhana

Light, crunchy and healthy roasted makhana with a spicy kick of black pepper.

Garlic

Garlic Makhana

Perfectly roasted makhana infused with the aromatic and savory taste of garlic.

Himalayan Salt

Himalayan Salt Makhana

Simple yet sophisticated, seasoned with pure Himalayan pink salt for a clean taste.

Peri Peri Masala

Peri Peri Masala Makhana

A fiery blend of spices for those who love a bold and tangy snacking experience.

Pudina

Pudina Makhana

Refreshing minty flavor combined with the crunch of roasted makhana.

Why Choose Us

Committed to Quality, Driven by Health

Direct from Source

We source the best foxnuts directly from farmers to ensure freshness.

Advanced Roasting

Our roasting technology preserves nutrients while providing maximum crunch.

Wholesale Pricing

Competitive pricing for distributors and bulk buyers worldwide.
